title: Admiral
description: An annotation based command handling library for Brigadier.
body:
An open-source annotation based command handling library mod for [Brigadier](https://github.com/Mojang/brigadier).

*This is a library mod, that does not add any functionality to the game on its own.
It is meant to be used as a library for other mods.*

*See the [GitHub page](https://github.com/henkelmax/admiral) for more information.*

⚠️ **Warning**
This project is still in early development and might contain bugs.
Please report any issues you find.
